name: Cauliflower and Potatoes (Aloo Gobi)
recipeInstructions:
1. Make the masala by sautéing onion, garlic, and ginger in a pan until fragrant.
2. Add chopped tomatoes to the mixture and cook until softened.
3. Stir in turmeric powder and the desired amount of salt and pepper.
4. Break the cauliflower into florets and cut the potatoes into cubes (about 8 pieces each).
5. Add the cauliflower and potato cubes to the masala, stirring gently.
6. Lower the heat to a simmer and cover the pot. Allow the vegetables to cook until they are tender and coated with the spice mixture.
